rulings.Case Title: PARKVIEW EDGE PROPERTIES, LLC VS. FLEUR FOSTER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 02, 2016 line 4. DEFENDANT FLEUR FOSTER, SHEIBA BOISSIERE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION continued to December 15, 2016. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 by 9:30 a.m. on December 2, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Additionally, Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is continued to December 15, 2016. Defendant is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 by 9:30 a.m. on December 2, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court received courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers for both motions. = (501/REQ)
